pos_sentences.text: Placement are also good average many big brand came
pos_sentences.name: College Ninja

pos_sentences.text: You enjoy a lot and you learn a lot of things and also you experience a better creativity
pos_sentences.name: College Ninja

pos_sentences.text: Teachers are good and skilled, environment are good
pos_sentences.name: College Ninja

pos_sentences.text: A lot of labs to work in and Ac class rooms.
pos_sentences.name: Soumya garg

pos_sentences.text: The faculty is average in teaching but wonderful in terms of personality.
pos_sentences.name: Soumya garg

pos_sentences.text: Events are organized by student, with student contribution and for students
pos_sentences.name: Soumya garg

neg_sentences.text: Timing of college are much more i thing this can be improved in further
neg_sentences.name: College Ninja

neg_sentences.text: Other activities like concerts evening party and extra co-cular activities are not there
neg_sentences.name: College Ninja

neg_sentences.text: Fee structure is more in  for middle class family
neg_sentences.name: College Ninja

neg_sentences.text: The classes are scheduled from 9 30 to 4 30 everyday.
neg_sentences.name: Soumya garg

neg_sentences.text: No intercollege events, or certifications or trips.
neg_sentences.name: Soumya garg

neg_sentences.text: Faculty does not inform things properly.
neg_sentences.name: Soumya garg
